introSection: Typhoon Coaster is a steel water roller coaster located at Land of Legends Theme Park in Ankara, Turkey. It opened with the park in 2016.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 5 rows for a total of 10 riders per car.

fullText:
Typhoon Coaster is a steel water roller coaster located at Land of Legends Theme Park in Ankara, Turkey. It opened with the park in 2016.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 5 rows for a total of 10 riders per car.
